generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.session_invalid: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.setup_already_complete: Setup is already complete. An admin account already exists.
auth.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.

user.email_exists: A user with this email address already exists.
user.last_admin: Cannot remove the last active admin. Promote another user to admin first.

validation.invalid_input: The submitted data is invalid. Please check the form and try again.
validation.unsupported_language: Language "{{value}}" is not supported. Supported languages: {{supported}}.
validation.unsupported_tracking_mode: Stock tracking mode "{{value}}" is not supported. Supported modes: {{supported}}.
validation.unsupported_stock_level: Stock level "{{value}}" is not supported. Supported levels: {{supported}}.

tree.cycle: This change would create a circular reference in the {{kind}} tree.
tree.delete_has_children: Cannot delete: this {{kind}} still has children. Remove them first.

location.delete_in_use: Location #{{id}} cannot be deleted because it is still in use.
location.container_link_conflict: Location #{{id}} is already linked to another stock instance.

item_definition.has_instances: This item definition cannot be deleted because it still has registered instances.
item_definition.tracking_mode_change_conflict: Cannot change the tracking mode while this definition still has registered stock lots.

stock_instance.serial_requires_qty_one: When a serial number is set, quantity must be exactly 1.
stock_instance.serial_duplicate: Serial number "{{serial}}" is already registered for this item definition.

instance.field_mode_mismatch: The field provided does not match this definition's stock tracking mode.

stock.negative_quantity: This operation would result in a negative quantity for lot #{{id}}.
stock.movement_not_applicable: Stock movements are not applicable to this definition's tracking mode (mode: {{mode}}).
stock.cannot_reverse_reversal: Cannot reverse movement #{{id}} because it is itself a reversal.
stock.reverse_would_go_negative: Reversing movement #{{id}} would drive the lot quantity below zero.

barcode.duplicate: This barcode code is already bound to another item definition.

internal.error: An internal error occurred. Please try again later.

http.403: You do not have permission to perform this action.
http.404: The requested resource was not found.
http.409: This operation conflicts with the current state.
